documentationFeedback: Envoy auto-subscription docs exist and are accurate. Gap: issue spec's curl example uses {"message": "..."} for prompt_async but actual serve API requires {"parts": [{"type": "text", "text": "..."}]} format. Also: gh pr review --comment events are NOT routed through Envoy (only issue_comment events are), and @mention comments route exclusively to mention topics (not duplicated on issue comment topics).
observations: Consistent 10-15s delivery latency across all tests
gh pr review --comment (pull_request_review events) NOT delivered via Envoy — only gh pr comment (issue_comment events) work
@mention comments route exclusively to mention topic, not duplicated on issue.N.> topic
Cross-mode cleanup removes entire Envoy interest entry (including agent topic), not selective
No automated CI-runnable E2E test for full delivery chain — regression risk
